speaker: Alvarez (dockworker)
text: We never saw it as a 'brief riot'. It wasn't spontaneous at all; stevedores met for days and printed leaflets. The march was planned to protest the wage cuts at Dockside.

speaker: Marisol Reyes
text: They say no one died, but we carried Daniel to the chapel; he was gone before midnight. The coroner never filed it because his family asked for silence.

speaker: Captain O'Neill
text: Order in two hours? Nonsense. We held the street from dusk until near sunrise. The police watched from the pier and stood back till morning.
